experience.title: My Experience
experience.tagline: See my most recent projects below to get an idea of my past experience.

about.title: About me
about.firstParagraph: I have experience in software development, especially in web development with a focus on frontend technologies. Since August 2024, I am working at RefineIT in Recklinghausen as part of the frontend team, focusing on ReactJS/NextJS. I previously completed an internship as a software developer at Alltagsauto.ch.
about.secondParagraph: From 03/2024 to 06/2024 I have worked as a Teaching Assistant in the same field where I studied, helping students learn and improve their skills.
about.thirdParagraph: Before I started programming, I graduated as a University Technician in Chemistry from Universidad Tecnológica Nacional Villa María in Argentina. This was my first experience with technology, through process simulations. By studying Chemical Engineering at university, I gained a solid understanding of mathematics, physics, chemistry, algebra, and calculus.
about.fourthParagraph: I live in Gelsenkirchen since April 2021. My native language is Spanish, I have a B2 level in German and a B2 level in English, and I speak Portuguese fluently.

fullstack.title: Full Stack
fullstack.desc: I have experience working with JavaScript, Typescript, Angular, React.js, Vue.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Bootstrap, among others.

leader.title: Experienced Leader
leader.desc: I was a president for 5 years, leading projects and growing the organization. As a football coach for 2 years, I improved my team management and communication skills.

growth.title: Growth & Learning
growth.desc: I always want to get better and learn about new technology in the market. I look for chances to grow my skills and use new ideas in my work.
